items.title: Black Panther
items.description: Film spotlight on representation, Afrofuturism, and cultural impact.

quiz.q: Black Panther is part of which kind of film world?
quiz.explanation: Black Panther is a superhero film in a larger cinematic universe.

quiz.q: The fictional home nation in Black Panther is what?
quiz.explanation: Wakanda is the fictional African nation in the film.

quiz.q: Why is Black Panther often discussed in culture lessons?
choices: It expanded representation in blockbuster films
quiz.explanation: It had a major impact on representation and cultural pride.

quiz.q: A major visual style linked to Black Panther is what?
quiz.explanation: The film is often linked to Afrofuturist design and storytelling.

quiz.q: What helped make Black Panther historically significant?
choices: Its cultural and box office impact
It was the first movie ever made
quiz.explanation: It made a major cultural and commercial impact.

items.title: Hidden Figures
items.description: Film about Black women mathematicians whose work supported NASA missions.

quiz.q: Hidden Figures tells the story of whom?
quiz.explanation: The film highlights Black women mathematicians at NASA.

quiz.q: Why is Hidden Figures important in education?
choices: It highlights overlooked contributions to science
quiz.explanation: It shows key STEM contributions that were often overlooked.

quiz.q: What field is central to the film?
quiz.explanation: The story centers on math and space missions.

quiz.q: What does the film help students see?
quiz.explanation: It helps students see real representation in STEM history.

quiz.q: The women in Hidden Figures supported work for what agency?
quiz.explanation: The film is about women whose work supported NASA.
